zh.lifeSummary: 當John Curzon於1339年出生時，他的父親John Curzon Snr25歲，母親Eleanor Twyford18歲。他於1382年與Ciceley MAINWARING在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1462年享年123歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Curzon于1339年出生时，他的父亲John Curzon Snr25岁，母亲Eleanor Twyford18岁。他于1382年与Ciceley MAINWARING在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1462年享年123岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Curzon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Notre-Dame-de-Courson in Calvados, France, which was named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Curtius (from curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -o, genitive -onis. There is also a place called Curzon in Vendée, but this is not the source of the English surname.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Curzon was born in 1339, his father, John Curzon Snr, was 25 and his mother, Eleanor Twyford, was 18. He married Ciceley MAINWARING in 1382, in England, United Kingdom. He died in 1462, at the age of 123, and was buried in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Curzon est né en 1339, son père, John Curzon Snr, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Twyford, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ciceley MAINWARING en 1382, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1462, à l’âge de 123 ans, et a été enterré à Kedleston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Curzon 1339 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Curzon Snr 25 und seine Mutter Eleanor Twyford 18. Er hat 1382 in England, United Kingdom Ciceley MAINWARING geheiratet. Er starb 1462 im Alter von 123 Jahren und wurde in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Curzon è nato il nel 1339, il suo padre, John Curzon Snr, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Twyford, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Ciceley MAINWARING nel 1382, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1462, all'età di 123 anni, e fu sepolto a Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Curzonが1339年に生まれた時，父John Curzon Snrは25歳，母Eleanor Twyfordは18歳であった。1382年にイギリスイギリスでCiceley MAINWARINGと結婚した。彼は1462年に123歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアケドレストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Curzon(이)가 1339년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Curzon Snr(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Twyford(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Ciceley MAINWARING(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1462년 123세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 케들레스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Curzon nasceu em 1339, seu pai, John Curzon Snr, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Twyford, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ciceley MAINWARING em 1382, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1462, com 123 anos, e foi sepultado em Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Curzon родился в 1339 г., его отцу по имени John Curzon Snr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Twyford, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ciceley MAINWARING в 1382 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1462 г. в возрасте 123 лет и был похоронен в местности кедлестон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Curzon nació en 1339, su papá, John Curzon Snr, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eleanor Twyford, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ciceley MAINWARING en 1382, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1462, a la edad de 123 años, y fue sepultado en Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
